title: Easiest way to mirror the Same Item On Multiple Boards with Updates

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
What’s a quick and easy way to mirror the same item on multiple boards?

monday.com is great at organising work inside a board.
Where it starts to get tricky is when the same piece of work needs to live on more than one board.

Most teams try to solve this using:
– Duplicate items
– Connect Boards + Mirror columns
– Or manual updates across boards

These approaches work to a point, but they usually break down when:
– Updates need to stay fully in sync
– Conversations happen on different boards
– Subitems are involved
– Or handoffs between teams are frequent

That’s the gap Mirror Item Multiple Boards is designed to address.

– Keep one item synced across multiple boards
Instead of creating copies, the app lets the same item exist on multiple boards. Any change made on one board — status, people, dates, text — is reflected everywhere the item appears.

151920×960 254 KB

– Updates and replies stay in sync
Item updates and replies remain consistent across boards. This includes subitem updates as well, which is often where mirror-based setups fall short. Teams don’t have to ask where the “latest comment” is.

161920×960 190 KB

– Support clean cross-team handoffs
Many workflows involve moving work between teams:
– Sales to Delivery
– Planning to Execution
– Review to Approval

The app supports automations like:
“When status changes → add item to another board and group”
without creating disconnected duplicates.

191920×960 168 KB

– Create a real master board
Some teams want a high-level view of work that spans multiple boards. Items can be mirrored into a master board while remaining fully editable from any location. Updates sync both ways.

181920×960 168 KB

– Turn subitems into standalone items
A subitem can become a full item on another board when work moves ownership. This is useful for teams that start work in one context and complete it in another, without losing history or updates.

201920×960 302 KB

– Reduce board clutter
Because this doesn’t rely on Connect Boards or Mirror columns:
– Boards stay simpler
– There are fewer columns to maintain
– And fewer sync issues to debug

Typical use cases

– Agencies managing client work across multiple boards
– Sales → Delivery handoffs
– Product and Engineering workflows
– Operations and PMO setups
– Any team that needs the same task visible in more than one place

171920×960 213 KB

This app isn’t meant to replace monday’s native features.
It’s meant for cases where the same item genuinely needs to exist across boards, with full sync, without workarounds.

If you’ve run into this limitation before, this might be useful.
